zh.lifeSummary: 當Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan於大約1386年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福時，她的父親Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd19歲，母親Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd15歲。她和Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan至少有2個兒子。她去世在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾，埋葬在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan于大约1386年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福时，她的父亲Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd19岁，母亲Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd15岁。她和Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan至少有2个儿子。她去世在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾，埋葬在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan was born about 1386, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales, her father, Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd, was 19 and her mother, Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, was 15. She had at least 2 sons with Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. She died in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.of Maes-gwyn,Nantmel,Radnorshire,Wales: Nantmel, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan est née environ 1386, à Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. Elle est décédée à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan um 1386 in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd 15. Sie hatte mit Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan è nata il circa 1386 nel Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. Morì nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Goleuddydd ferch Ieuanが約1386年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフで生まれた時，父Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffuddは19歳，母Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffuddは15歳であった。彼女はDafydd Fychan ap Ieuanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan(이)가 대략 1386년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. Ela faleceu em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan родилась около 1386 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. Она умерла в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Goleuddydd ferch Ieuan nació aproximadamente 1386, en Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Ieuan "Gryg" ap Gruffudd, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ieuan Gryg ap Gruffudd, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Dafydd Fychan ap Ieuan. Murió en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
